role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused on script, language, and street naming conventions ('Via', 'Cecco Angiolieri').
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation types, and climate cues (Mediterranean, sun angle).
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified specific plant species (Cedrus atlantica) and landscaping styles.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road signs (Vienna Convention, blue circles, yellow notices) and infrastructure.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized architectural details (shutters, stucco) and street furniture to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Italy by leveraging the linguistic evidence (Italian text) and regulatory evidence (signage standards) to decisively rule out other Mediterranean candidates. The reasoning was consistent and well-supported by the image.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Text on signs matches image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Vegetation and lighting cues match image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Tree species identification is visually plausible.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Sign shapes and colors match image.
